title: Senior Software Engineer - HCL Technologies - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - HCL Technologies - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
HCL Technologies has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Bhopal office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About HCL Technologies:
HCL Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HCL Technologies!
